subject: Discovery call
body: Q1 expansion planned and active search for outbound automation platform with governance controls. Budget is approved and vendor selection is expected this month.

subject: Follow up from demo
body: Asked for security documentation and confirmed a March pilot launch target with two sales pods if legal review clears this week.

subject: Conference conversation
body: Interested in replacing manual prospecting workflows and reducing SDR tooling cost.

subject: Intro call summary
body: Shared current stack limitations and requested benchmark examples for reply rate lift.

subject: Pilot planning
body: Confirmed two team trial and requested integration path with CSV first then CRM.

subject: Send case studies
body: Need two relevant customer stories focused on revops automation and governance.

subject: Executive follow up
body: Asked for implementation ownership model and expected timeline to first campaign. Stated the team wants to replace their current outbound stack before the next quarter starts.

subject: Operations review
body: Discussed sender warmup and daily limits and compliance approval workflow. Procurement review is underway and rollout is targeted within 30 days.

subject: Growth initiative review
body: Looking for multi channel motion starting with email then LinkedIn in phase two.

subject: Partner context
body: Mentioned strategic partnership motion where outbound needs shared account context.

subject: Commercial review
body: Requested enterprise pricing model security docs and projected ROI assumptions.

subject: Technical validation
body: Asked for API and webhook architecture review with their sales engineering team.
